ACCESSLOGIN_LOG_FORDB.DESC: Record Access Login log into DB, default to null

APAR_COMMIT.DESC: APAR Transaction Records Synchronous Update TRX_APAR Table Flag

ARC_DELRESTORE_PROTECT.DESC: Protect the DelRestoredData flag to forbid user change it

AUTH_GAPI_WHILE_RELEASE.DESC: Send the release and authorization GAPI separate while authorize

CALL_VOUCHER_GAPI.DESC: The GAPI Rule to be Sent with Voucher

CANCELLATION_NEGATIVE_AMT_TODAY.DESC: Amount of the Day Negative Flag

CHECK_SWIFT_TAG_LEN.DESC: Check Outgoing SWIFT Tag Length Flag

CVS_RELEASE_PATH.DESC: Administrator use this path to release parameters

CVS_SUBMIT_PATH.DESC: Operator use this path to submit parameters

EC_PROCESS_INITIALSSS.DESC: Initial SSS can be processed in FP

EDI_OUT_GOING_FOLDER.DESC: EDI Send Destination (The Physical Folder Path)

ERR_PWD_LOCK_TIMES.DESC: Maximum of Incorrect Web Login Password

FLOW_ACTIVE.DESC: Active Function Flow Mode by country

GAPI_VIEW_FLAG.DESC: GAPI can be previewed or viewed during transaction or not.

GET_RELEASE_PAGE_CLASS.DESC: The Project-Based Class for Special Business Logic

INTP_BLANK_VAL.DESC: Auto-Add Blank Value for Interpreter Field Flag

IN_IMG_MAX_UPLOAD_TIMES.DESC: Max Times of MQ Image Uploading

IS_BACKUP_RESTORE_INFO.DESC: Backup information for version control restore

I_REFNOPOOL_SIZE.DESC: Reference Numbers Quantity with Reference Pool

MAILTEMPLATE_FOLDER.DESC: Where JSP for eMAIL interface is put

MISREPORT_TRA_TYPE.DESC: Rollback the Transaction Flag in cases of MIS Report Data Processing Failure

MQ_CONNECTION_CYCLE_WAITINTERVAL.DESC: MQ connect circular wait Interval Flag (Unit is Hour)

MQ_CONNECTION_NUMBER.DESC: MQ Number of connections Flag default 3.

MQ_CONNECTION_WAITINTERVAL.DESC: MQ connect wait interval flag default 30(Second).

RATE_CHECK_PRICEDATE.DESC: Exchange Rate Check Price Date Flag

RELEASE_NOT_BYSELF.DESC: The system parameter to controll whether release user could be the same one of create user.

REVERSE_DC_WHEN_CANCELLATION.DESC: D/C of Generated Voucher to be Reversed after Cancellation Flag

SEC_USER_MIN_LEN.DESC: Minimum Length of Security User ID

SIGNATURE_GRAPHICS_GEN_PATH.DESC: Signature graphics generate path. Add this parameter in AP system parameter.

SODEOD_BY_PC.DESC: SODEOD Task Run By PC Flag

SWIFT_ADD_HO.DESC: The Field Name of Head Office SWIFT Address in BANK_MASTER Table

SWIFT_B1_BY_PC.DESC: B1 TAG from the PC unit of the branch

SWIFT_BIC_EXT.DESC: Extend BIC Code to Show Bank Name and Address Flag

SWIFT_BK_ADD.DESC: The Field Name that Store Bank Address.

SWIFT_BK_KEY.DESC: The Field Name that Store Bank BIC Code.

SWIFT_BK_NM.DESC: The Field Name that Store Bank Name.

SWIFT_BK_TABLE.DESC: The Table Name where Store the Bank SWIFT Name and Address.

SWIFT_CHAR_SET_CHECK.DESC: Check Every SWIFT Tag Character Validation Flag

SWIFT_CHAR_TRANSLATION_CLASS.DESC: Translate Every SWIFT Tag Character Flag (Userdefined Class)

SWIFT_INCOMING_WITHDO.DESC: Which message need incoming with DO

SWIFT_OUT_GOING_FOLDER.DESC: SWIFT Send Destination (The Physical Folder Path)

SWIFT_OUT_GOING_KEY.DESC: Add Outgoing SWIFT Encrypted Key Flag

SWIFT_PAN_NAN_PROCESS_CLASS.DESC: The Project-Based Class for Special Business Logic

SWIFT_REFORMAT_COMPONENT.DESC: The Project-Based Class for Reformat SWIFT Message Content

SWIFT_ROWS_BY_VALUE.DESC: Show the Rows of SWIFT Narrative Tag Flag

SWIFT_TO_FOLDER.DESC: SWIFT Send Destination Flag (MQ or Physical Folder)

SWIFT_WITH_INTP_DESC.DESC: SWIFT Tag Value Using Interpreter Field Description Flag

SW_ADD.DESC: The Field Name of Head Office SWIFT Address in BANK_MASTER Table

SYS_ADD_DIARY_FUNC_ID.DESC: Add System Level Diary Function ID

SYS_CHECK_FIELD.DESC: Whether check field value length and type from submitted page or not, default to TRUE

SYS_EXRATE_NOT_SHOW_ERR.DESC: Not Show Exchange Rate Error Message

SYS_GET_ERATE_DEF.DESC: System Retrieves Exchange Rate Method (From CCY Equals To CCY)

SYS_KP_PROTECT.DESC: Protect Fields From Pending Transaction in KP Function Flag

SYS_SOD_CHECK_HOLIDAY.DESC: Check Holiday and Weekend Setting During SOD on Batch Mode Flag

SYS_SOD_ONLY_TIME.DESC: SOD and EOD Run Times in One Day

SYS_SWIFT_MANAGER_CLASS.DESC: The Project-Based Class for Special Business Logic

VCH_AMT_SINGLE_COL.DESC: Show Amount in Single Column of Generated Voucher

VCH_PRT_ENTRY_NUMS.DESC: Voucher Entries Number to be Shown on Each Printed Page

VIEW_SIGNED_DOCUMENT_PATH.DESC: Which is used to identify the directory in which are stored those returned signed documents.

WEB_CATALOG_REPLACE_USER_ID_WITH_DESC.DESC: Set its value to FALSE to reserve USER_ID instead of replace it with USER_DESC on the catalog page, default to TRUE

WEB_IMAGE_MAX_FILE_SIZE.DESC: The Maximum Size of an Uploaded Image File

WEB_IMAGE_ROOT_PATH.DESC: The Root Path of an Uploaded Image File

WEB_IMG_TOTAL_FILES_MAX_SIZE.DESC: The Maximum Size of Total Uploaded Image Files for One Transaction (M)

WEB_SCRN_TEXTAREA_IGNORE_NLCR.DESC: Ignore NewLine&CarriageReturn in total number of characters from textarea element. Default to FALSE, aka count NL&CR into total characters number.
